plot.caption: Donut chart of the churn label. The hollow ring shows the proportional split; the centre displays the total count and overall churn rate. Green = retained, red = churned.

narrative: Dataset holds 5,630 customers: 4,682 retained and 948 churned (16.84% churn rate). Imbalance ratio = 4.94:1. Severity: moderate.

recommendation.rationale: Ratio 4.94:1 is mildly imbalanced. Algorithmic class weights alone typically handle this well. Avoid resampling unless metrics disappoint.
stage_3_5_plan: Compare against threshold tuning on a calibrated model.
